1: SELECT * FROM "eventspaces" WHERE ("event_space" ILIKE '%Banquet Hall%' OR "event_space" ILIKE '%Conference Room%') AND "capacity" >= 200;
2:
SELECT *
FROM "eventspaces"
WHERE ("event_space" LIKE '%Banquet Hall%' OR "event_space" LIKE '%Conference Room%')
  AND "capacity" = 200;
3:
SELECT DISTINCT r."name"
FROM "restaurants" r
WHERE r."food_service" ILIKE '%Restaurant%' AND r."cuisine" ILIKE '%Italian%'
UNION
SELECT DISTINCT r."name"
FROM "restaurants" r
WHERE r."food_service" ILIKE '%Café%' AND r."cuisine" ILIKE '%Italian%';
5:
SELECT DISTINCT *
FROM restaurants
WHERE (food_service ILIKE '%café%' OR food_service ILIKE '%restaurant%')
  AND cuisine ILIKE '%italian%';
6:
SELECT 'Chef' AS "category", "name", "role", "language"
FROM "staff"
WHERE "role" = 'Chef'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Server (English)' AS "category", "name", "role", "language"
FROM "staff"
WHERE "role" = 'Server' AND "language" = 'English'
ORDER BY "category", "name";
7:
SELECT DISTINCT s."name", s."role"
FROM "staff" s
WHERE (s."role" ILIKE '%chef%' OR s."role" ILIKE '%server%')
  AND s."language" ILIKE '%english%';
8:
SELECT DISTINCT s."name", s."role", s."language"
FROM "staff" s
WHERE (s."role" LIKE 'Chef' OR s."role" LIKE 'Server')
  AND s."language" LIKE 'English';
108:
WITH total_hospitals AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "hospitals"
)
SELECT DISTINCT mr."salary"
FROM "hospitals_medical_roles" hmr
JOIN "medicalroles" mr ON hmr."roleid" = mr."roleid"
CROSS JOIN total_hospitals th
GROUP BY mr."roleid", mr."salary", th.cnt
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT hmr."hospitalid") = th.cnt
109:
SELECT 
    "s"."name" AS "specialist_name",
    "sys"."system_name"
FROM "it_support_specialists" "s"
JOIN "it_support_specialists_systems" "iss" ON "s"."id" = "iss"."it_specialist_id"
JOIN "systems" "sys" ON "iss"."system_id" = "sys"."system_id"
ORDER BY "s"."name", "sys"."system_name";
110:
SELECT *
            FROM (
                SELECT DISTINCT sp."name", s."system_name", s."is_active"
                FROM "it_support_specialists" sp
JOIN "it_support_specialists_systems" iss ON sp."id" = iss."it_specialist_id"
JOIN "systems" s ON iss."system_id" = s."system_id"
            ) sub
            ORDER BY sp."name", s."system_name" ;
111:
SELECT 
    "iss"."name" AS "specialist_name",
    "s"."system_name",
    "s"."is_active"
FROM "it_support_specialists" "iss"
JOIN "it_support_specialists_systems" "iss_sys" ON "iss"."id" = "iss_sys"."it_specialist_id"
JOIN "systems" "s" ON "iss_sys"."system_id" = "s"."system_id"
ORDER BY "iss"."name", "s"."system_name";
112:
SELECT r."responsibility"
FROM responsibilities r
JOIN internships_responsibilities ir ON r."id" = ir."responsibilityid"
GROUP BY r."id", r."responsibility"
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT ir."internshipid") = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM internships);
114:
SELECT *
            FROM (
                SELECT DISTINCT s."name" AS specialist_name,
    sys."system_name" AS system_name
                FROM "it_support_specialists" s
JOIN "it_support_specialists_systems" ss ON s."id" = ss."it_specialist_id"
JOIN "systems" sys ON ss."system_id" = sys."system_id"
            ) sub
            ORDER BY s."name", sys."system_name" ;
261:
SELECT "minimum_years", "preferred_years"
FROM "jobs"
WHERE "salary" IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY "salary" DESC
LIMIT 1;
262:
SELECT DISTINCT
    sd."salary_range",
    sd."hourly_rate"
FROM "position" p
JOIN "salarydetails" sd ON p."id" = sd."positionid"
WHERE p."title" ILIKE '%software developer%';
265:
SELECT "preferred_years" 
FROM "jobs" 
ORDER BY "salary" DESC 
LIMIT 1;
